name: Loxley Public Company Limited
summary: Loxley Public Company Limited engages in the trading and turnkey contract sale of telecommunication equipment, rail transport engineering and other systems in Thailand. It operates through six segments: Information Technology Business Group, Energy Business Group, Network Solutions Business Group, Trading Business Group, Services Business Group, and Special and Other Businesses. The company is involved in the trading of computers, computer spare parts, and computer programs; telecommunication equipment; service of information technology equipment and computer systems; sale and service of prepaid electronic cash cards; power system business; trading and installation of elevators and escalators; manufacture and distribution of citrus essential oil and electricity; renting of buildings and advertising boards; and planning, designing, installing, and construction of solar power plants; and sale of consumer products. It also provides airport and other security services; telecommunication and computerized database; submarine cable network; recruitment, personnel development, training, and other related; engineering services; distributes and provides advance security equipment and solutions; and wholesales raw materials and food supply, as well as food service. In addition, the company manufactures, assembles, and trades in electricity automotive; sale, service, and installation of automatic telephone switching systems; and IT infrastructure improvement projects. Further, it manufactures, assembles, and distributes steam generator; imports, exports, and distributes virtual learning services and system development; and manufactures and installs compressors, steam generators, pressure tanks, filters, and conveyor belts. The company was formerly known as Loxley (Bangkok) Company Limited and changed its name to Loxley Public Company Limited in April 1993. Loxley Public Company Limited was incorporated in 1939 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
